nav.localeSwitchBlockedDescription: Your cart uses {currency}. Clear your cart or finish shopping before switching to a different currency.

plp.heroSubtitle: Thoughtfully curated home and lifestyle pieces, made to last and easy to love.
plp.productCount: {count, plural, =0 {No products} one {# product} other {# products}}
plp.emptyDescription: Try a different category or sort option.

product.addedToCartDescription: Your item is ready in the cart.
product.addToCartFailed: Could not add to cart. Please try again.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.emptyDescription: Your cart is empty. Browse the collection and add something you love.
cart.checkoutToastDescription: This is a demo storefront. Payment and delivery aren't wired up yet. Your cart still works for browsing and quantity updates.
cart.secureCheckout: Secure checkout · Taxes calculated at checkout
cart.promoDemoNote: Demo only. Discount is visual only, not sent to commercetools. Resets on refresh.

footer.aboutDescription: A warm, minimal demo storefront built for the IONA take-home exam. It includes a product listing, product detail, and cart.
footer.newArrivalsToastDescription: A dedicated new arrivals page isn't live yet. Browse the full collection from the home page for now.
footer.bestsellersToastDescription: Our bestsellers page is on the way. Explore all products from the shop in the meantime.
footer.giftIdeasToastDescription: Curated gift guides are in the works. Check back soon for hand-picked ideas.
footer.shippingReturnsToastDescription: Policy pages aren't wired up in this demo. Eligible orders include free shipping over $75 and 30-day easy returns.
footer.sizeGuideToastDescription: Fit and sizing guides aren't available yet in this demo storefront.
footer.contactUsToastDescription: Support isn't connected in this demo. In production, this would link to email, chat, or a help centre.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: We could not load the storefront. Please try again.

notFound.title: This page is no longer available.
notFound.description: Don't worry, you can still discover great products.
